text_fr: 1340  (XIII)  de  I' Assemblee  generale,  en  date du 13  decembre  1958;
text_en: 1340 (XIII) of the General Assembly, of 13 December 1958;

items_fr: ii)  527.988 dollars,  representant le  montant des  exce› dents  budgetaires  au  31 decembre  1958  non encore  portes  en  deduction  des  contributions  des Etats  Membres,  conformement a la resolution 1445  (XIV)  de  l'Assemblee  generale,  en  date du  5  decembre  1959;

2. Les Etats Membres feront  des  avances  en  especes au  Fonds de  roulement;  en  application  de  l"alinea a du paragraphe  1  ci-dessus  et  conformement  au  bareme adopte  par  I'Assemblee generale  pour  les  contributions des  Etats Membres au  budget  de  l'exercice 1961;

3. II  sera effectue une compensation entre ces  avances et les  sommes  versees  par Jes  Etats  Membres au  Fonds de  roulement  pour  l'exercice  1960  confonnement a la resolution  1445  (XIV)  de  I' Assemblee  generale,  etant entendu  que,  au  cas  ou  I'avance  versee  par  un  Etat Membre  au  Fonds  de  roulement  pour  l'exercice  1960 serait  superieure a l'avance que  cet  Etat  doit  consentir aux termes  du  paragraphe 2  ci-dessus,  le  surplus  vien› drait  en  deduction  du  montant  des  contributions  dues par I'Etat Membre au titre du  budget de  l'exercice 1961 OU  de tout budget antcrieur;
4. Le  Secretaire general  est  autorise a avancer,  par prelevement  sur le  Fonds de  roulement:

a) Les  sommes  qui  pourront  etre  necessaires  pour !'execution du budget, en attendant le  recouvrement des contributions,  etant  entendu que  Jes  sommes  ainsi  avan› cees  devront etre remboursees aussitot que l'on disposrra a cette  fin  de  recettes  provenant  cles  contributions ;

b) Les  sommes  qui  pourront  etre  necessaires  ponr faire face aux engagements de depenses dument autorises conformement  a  la  resolution  1585  (XV)  de  l'Assem› blee  generale,  en  date  du  20  decembre  1960,  relative aux  depenses  imprevues  et  extraordinaires,  etant  en› tendu  que  le  Secretaire  general  clemandera,  clans  le projet de  budget,  des  credits pour  rembourser  le  Fonds de  roulement ;

c)  Des sommes qui,  jointes aux montants  nets  avan› ces  pour  le  meme  objet,  ne  depassent  pas  125.000 dollars,  pour  continuer  d'alimenter le  fonds  d'avances remboursables  destine  a  financer  divers  achats  et  ope› rations  amortissables,  etant  entendu  que  des  avances au-dela du total de  125.000 dollars  pourront etre accor› dees  avec  I'assentiment prealable  du  Comite  consultatif pour les  questions aclministratives  et  budgetaires;

d) Des  sommes,  a  titre  de  pret, a des  institutions specialisees  et a des  commissions  preparatoires  d'insti› tutions  a  creer  par  accord  intergouvernemental  conclu sous  les  auspices  de  !'Organisation des  Nations  Unies, pour financer  leurs  travaux,  en attendant que les  insti› tutions interessees aient  encaisse  des  montants suffisants sur les  contributions prevues par leurs propres budgets ; ces  prets  seront  normalement  remboursables  en  deux ans  et le  Secretaire general  devra  obtenir  l'assentiment prealable du Comite consultatif pour les questions admi› nistratives  et  budgetaires  avant  de  consentir  un  pret en especes  si,  du  fait  de  ce  pret,  le  montant  global  des prets non rembourses devait depasser a un moment quel› conque  250.000  dollars  (y  compris  les  sommes  deja pretees et  non  remboursees) ;

e) Les sommes,  a  concurrence de  35.000 dollars,  qui pourront  etre  necessaires  pour  couvrir  le  versement antici~  de  primes  d'assurance  si  la. periode  d'assu› rance  se prolonge au-dela  de  l'exercice au  cours duquel le versernent  est effectue,  etant entendu que ce  montant
items_en: (ii) $527,988, representing the amount of the budgetary surplus as at 31 December 1958 not yet applied to reduce the contributions of Member States, in accordance with General Assembly Resolution 1445 (XIV) of 5 December 1959;

2. Member States shall make advances to the Working Capital Fund in accordance with paragraph 1 (a) above and in accordance with the scale adopted by the General Assembly for the contributions of Member States to the budget for the financial year 1961;

3. A compensation shall be made between these advances and the sums paid by Member States to the Working Capital Fund for the financial year 1960 in accordance with General Assembly Resolution 1445 (XIV), provided that, in the event that an advance paid by a Member State to the Working Capital Fund for the financial year 1960 is greater in advance than that State must consent under the terms of paragraph 2 above, the surplus shall be calculated as a reduction in the amount of the contributions due by the Member State in respect of the budget for the financial year 1961 OR of any anterior budget;
4. The Secretary-General shall be authorized to advance, by way of advance from the Working Capital Fund:

(a) Such sums as may be necessary for the implementation of the budget, pending the collection of contributions, on the understanding that I am so paid, shall be reimbursed as soon as revenue from contributions is available for that purpose;

(b) Such sums as may be necessary to meet the commitments of expenditure authorized in accordance with General Assembly Resolution 1585 (XV) of 20 December 1960 on unforeseeable and extraordinary expenditure, as the Secretary-General will, in the draft budget, declare appropriations for the reimbursement of the Working Capital Fund;

(c) Amounts which, together with the net amounts for the same purpose, do not exceed $125,000, in order to continue to provide the reimbursable advance fund for various depreciable purchases and operations, on the understanding that advances in excess of the total amount of $125,000 may be made with the prior concurrence of the Advisory Committee on Final and Budgetary Questions;

(d) Amounts, as a loan, to specialized institutions and to preparatory commissions for the establishment by intergovernmental agreement concluded under the auspices of the United Nations, to finance their work, pending the receipt of sufficient funds from the institutions concerned in respect of contributions provided for in their own budgets; such loans shall normally be reimbursable within two years and the Secretary-General shall obtain the prior consent of the Advisory Committee on Administrative and Budgetary Questions before making a loan in kind if, as a result of that loan, the total amount of non-reimbursable loans was to exceed at any time the amount of $250,000 (including the amounts already paid and not reimbursed);

(e) The amount of up to $35,000 which may be required to cover the payment of insurance premiums before the insurance period is extended to the year in which the payment is made, provided that such amount

text_fr: pourra  etre  augmente  avec  l'assentiment  prealable  du Comite  consultatif  pour  Jes  questions  administratives et  bmlgetaires;  le  Secretaire general demandera clans  le projet  de  budget  de  chaque  exercice  des  credits a cet effet  pendant  toute la  duree  des  polices,  afin  de  couvrir Jes sommes  dues  au  titre  de  l'exercice;
text_en: may be increased with the prior approval of the Advisory Committee on Administrative and Bmlgetary Questions; the Secretary General shall request the draft budget for each financial year of the appropriations to this effect throughout the duration of the policies, in order to cover the sums due for the financial year;

items_fr: f) Les  sommes  qui  pourront  etre  necessaires  au Fonds de  perequation  des  impots  pour  faire  face  a  ses obligations  courantes  en  attendant  qu'il soit  credite des sommes qui doivent venir l'alimenter, etant entendu que les  avances  ainsi  faites  seront  remboursees  des  que  le Fonds de perequation des  impots sera credite de sommes suffisantes ;

g) Les  sommes, a concurrence  de  100.000  dollars pendant  la  periode  de  1961 a 1964,  qui  pourront  etre necessaires pour financer  Jes  prix tendant a encourager, sur  le  plan  international,  la  recherche  scientifique  clans le  domaine  de  la Jutte  contre  les  maladies  cancereuses, conformement a  la  resolution  1398  (XIV)  de  I' Assem› blee generale en date du 20 novembre 1959, etant entendu que  le  Secretaire  general  demandera  clans  les  projets de  budget  annuels  Jes  credits  necessaires  pour  rem› bourser le  Foncls  de  roulement;

5. Au  cas  ou  les  sommes  prevues  au  paragraphe  1 ci-dessus  ne  suffiraient  pas  a  faire  face  aux  besoins  de tresorerie  qui  sont  normalement  couverts  par  le  Fonds de  roulement,  le  Secretaire  general  est  autorise a uti› liser  en  1961,  aux  conditions  approuvees  clans  la  reso› lution  1448  (XIV)  de  l'Assemblee generale,  en  date du  5  decembre  1959,  des  sommes  qu'il  prelevera  sur les  fonds  et  comptes  speciaux  commis a sa  garde,  OU  i contracter  des  empnmts a court  terme  aupres  des gouvernements.
items_en: (f) Such sums as may be required by the Taxpaying Fund to meet its current obligations pending the crediting of the sums to be provided to it, provided that such advances shall be repaid as soon as sufficient sums are credited to the Taxpaying Fund;

(g) The sums, up to $100,000 during the period 1961 to 1964, which may be necessary to finance the prices intended to encourage, at the international level, scientific research in the field of the Jutte against cancerous diseases, in accordance with Resolution 1398 (XIV) of the Assem› generale of 20 November 1959, on the understanding that the Secretary-General will request the annual draft budgets Is necessary for the award of the Foncls of rotation;

5. In the event that the sums provided for in paragraph 1 above would not be sufficient to meet the needs of treasuries which are normally covered by the Working Capital Fund, the Secretary-General shall be authorized to use in 1961, subject to the conditions approved by the General Assembly in its resolution 1448 (XIV) of 5 December 1959, sums which he shall draw from the funds and special accounts committed to his custody, OR to enter into short-term payments with Governments.

text_fr: 960eme  seance  pleniere, 20  decembre  1960.
text_en: 960th plenary session, 20 December 1960.

text_fr: 1587  (XV).  Dispositions  administratives  decou› lant du projet de convention unique sur les stupefiants
text_en: 1587 (XV). Administrative provisions of the draft Single Convention on Stupefiants

text_fr: L' Assemblee  generale,
text_en: The General Assembly,

text_fr: Trnant  compte du  fait  qu'une conference  de  pleni› potentiaires  se  reunira a New  York  en  janvier  1961 pour conclure  une convention unique sur les stupefiants,
text_en: Taking into account the fact that a conference of potential pleni› will meet in New York in January 1961 to conclude a single convention on stupefiants,

text_fr: Ayant  pris  acte  avec  approbation du  rapport  du Comite  consultatif  pour  Jes  questions  administratives  et hudgetaires  sur  Jes  dispositions  administratives  decou› lant du  projet de convention unique sur les  stupefiants 4 ~,
text_en: Having taken note with approval of the report of the Advisory Committee on Administrative and Budgetary Questions on administrative arrangements for the draft Single Convention on Stupefiants 4 ~,

items_fr: I. Prie le Secretaire  general  de  transmettre a la conference  de  plenipotentiaires  le  rapport  du  Comite consultatif  pour  les  questions  administratives  et bud› getaires;
2. Recommande a  !'attention  de  la  conference  les recommandations  du  Comite  consultatif  touchant  les articles  pertinents  du  projet  de  conve~tion  unique.
items_en: I. Requests the Secretary-General to transmit to the Plenipotentiary Conference the report of the Advisory Committee on Administrative and Budgetary Questions;
2. Recommends to the Conference that the Advisory Committee's recommendations concerning the relevant articles of the Single Draft Convention be taken into consideration.

text_fr: 960eme  seance  pleniere, 20  decembre  1960.
text_en: 960th plenary session, 20 December 1960.

text_fr: 1588  (XV).  Regime  des frais  de  voyage et dee indemnites de eubsistance payes  awt mem› hres des organes et des organes eubsidiairee de !'Organisation des Nations  Unies
text_en: 1588 (XV). Scheme of costs of travel and compensation for eubsistance paid awt mem› hres of the organs and eubsidiary organs of the United Nations

text_fr: L' Assemblee  generate,
text_en: The General Assembly,

text_fr: Con firmant les  principes  regissant  le  paiement par !'Organisation des  Nations  Unies  des  frais  de  voyage
text_en: Confirming the principles governing the payment by the United Nations of travel expenses

text_fr: et des  indemnites  de  subsistance  aux  membres  des organes  et  des  oi,-gan~s  subsidiair~s  de. !'Organisation, tels  qu'ils sont  enonces  clans  la  resolut10n  1075  (XI) de l'Assemblee generate, en date du 7 decembre  1956,
text_en: and subsistence allowances to the members of the organs and subsidiary organs of the Organization, as set out in Resolution 10n 1075 (XI) of the General Assembly of 7 December 1956,

text_fr: N otant cependant les  augmentations des  frais  de  sub› sistance  intervenues  depuis  qu'elle a  arrete  le  montant des indemnites de subsistance clans sa resolution 459 (V) du  ler decembre  1950,
text_en: However, bearing in mind the increases in the costs of sub-sistence since it stopped the amount of subsistence allowances in its resolution 459 (V) of 1 December 1950,

items_fr: 1. Decide que, a compter  du  ler  janvi~r  1961,  le montant des  indemnites journalieres de  subststance ve~› sees  aux  membres  des  organes  et  des  organes  ~ubs1diaires  de  !'Organisation des  Nations  Unies  remphssant les  conditions  voulues  sera  le  suivant:
items_en: 1. Decides that, as from 1 January 1961, the amount of daily subsistence allowances for members of the organs and bodies of the United Nations invoking the necessary conditions shall be as follows:

text_en: C) While the interests participate in meetings held elsewhere than in New York and Geneva, a fixed amount by the Secretary General but unable to pass!' equivalent in local currency of

items_fr: 2. Decide de  maintenir a 10 dollars pour chacune des journees pendant !esquelles les  interesses assistent a  une reunion  l'indemnite  journaliere  de  subsistance  versee atL'{  membres  remplissant  les  conditions  voulues  et  deja en  poste  clans  la  ville  oi:t  a  lieu  la  reunion,  et  de  main› tenir a 8 dollars  l'indemnite journaliere versee  pendant la  duree  des  voyages  en  bateau,  en  train  et  en  avion ;

3. Authorizes the Secretary General to stop the administrative arrangements and procedures required!'applying the present resolution.

text_fr: 960e1ne  seance  pleniere, 20  decembre  1960.
text_en: 960th plenary session, 20 December 1960.

text_fr: 1589  (XV). Transfert du siege de !'Organisation mondiale de la sante:  somme a rembourser par !'Organisation des  Nations  Unies
text_en: 1589 (XV). Transfer of the seat of the World Health Organization: sum to be reimbursed by the United Nations

text_fr: L' Assemblee  generale,
text_en: The General Assembly,

text_fr: C onsiderant qu'a  sa  douzieme  session  1' Assemblee mondiale  de  la  sante  a  decide  de  faire  construire  un nouveau  batiment pour y  installer  le  siege  de  !'Organi› sation  mondiale  de  la  sante,
text_en: The World Health Assembly decided to build a new building for the establishment of the Organi World Health Assembly.

text_fr: C onsiderant que  cette organisation a  pris a  sa  charge, en  partie au  moyen  d'un don  de la  Confederation  suisse, le  emit  des  travaux  d'agrandissement executes  en  1950 au  Palais des  Nations pour y  abriter le  siege de !'Orga› nisation mondiale de  la  sante,
text_en: In view of the fact that this organization took over its responsibility, partly by means of a donation from the Swiss Confederation, the embodiment of the expansion work carried out in 1950 at the Palais des Nations to house the seat of !'Orga› world health nization,

items_fr: 1. Decide de  verser a  !'Organisation mondiale  de  la sante  4.425.763  francs  suisses  ( 1.019.761  dollars)  en remboursement  des  capitaux  investis  par  cette  organi› sation clans  le  Palais des  Nations ;

2. Aittorise, a  cette  fin,  le  Secretaire  general  a  ins› crire  au  budget  de  !'Organisation des  Nations  Unies, pour chacun des exercices  1962,  1%3 et  1964,  un credit annuel  de  340.000  dollars.
items_en: 1. Decides to pay to the World Health Organization 4,425,763 Swiss francs (US$ 1,019,761) in return for the capital invested by this organization in the Palais des Nations;
2. For this purpose, the Secretary General has included in the budget of the United Nations, for each of the financial years 1962, 1%3 and 1964, an annual credit of 340,000 dollars.

text_fr: 960eme  seance  pleniere, 20  decembre  1960.
text_en: 960th plenary session, 20 December 1960.

text_fr: 1590  (XV).  Operaiions  des  Nat.ions  Unies au Congo
text_en: 1590 (XV). Operation of the United Nations Nat.ions in the Congo

text_fr: L' Assemblee  generate,
text_en: The General Assembly,

text_fr: Notant que sa resolution  1583  (~V)\_ du  20  dece~bre 1960  prevoit  le  financernent  des, o\_perattons  de~  ~at1ons U nies  au  Congo  pendant  la  pen ode  du  14  J u11let  au 31 decembre  1960  a  concurrence  d'un  montant  de 48.500.000  dollars  et  porte creation  d'un compte ad  hoe a cette  fin,
text_en: Noting that its Resolution 1583 (~V) of 20 December 1960 provides for the financing of a sum of US$ 48,500,000 and the creation of an ad hoe account in the Congo during the period from 14 July to 31 December 1960,

text_fr: Ayant  ete  informee par  le  Secretaire  general. que, si  ces  operations se  poursuivent en  1961  au meme  mveau qu'a l'heure actuelle,  on  peut s'attendre que les  depenses qui  en  resulteront  s'elevent a plus  de  8  millior:s  de dollars  par mois 46 ,
text_en: Having been informed by the Secretary General that, if these operations continue in 1961 at the same level as at present, it can be expected that the expenditure resulting from them will rise to more than 8 millior:s of dollars per month 46,

items_fr: I. Decide qu'a la  reprise de  sa quinzieme  session  elle examinera  d'urgence le  financement  des  depenses  qui pourront  etre engagees  en  1961  au  titre  des  operations des  Nations  Unies au  Congo;
2. Prie le Secretaire  general  de  soumettre  le  plus tot  possible,  et  au  plus  tard  le  1 er  mars  1961,  des previsions  de  depenses  pour ces  operations ;

3. Autorise le Secretaire  general,  en  attendant  que l' Assemblee  generale  prenne  une  decision  a  la  reprise de  sa  quinzieme  session  et  en  s'efforc;ant de  realiser  le maximum d'economies, a engager des depenses  en  1961 au  titre  des  operations  des  Nations  Unies  au  Congo  a concurrence  d'un total  de  24  millions  de  dollars  pour la  periode allant  du  ler janvier au  31  mars  1961.
items_en: I. Decides that, at its resumed fifty-fifth session, the General Assembly shall urgently consider the financing of the costs to be incurred in 1961 under United Nations operations in the Congo;
2. Requests the Secretary-General to submit as soon as possible, and no later than 1 March 1961, provisions for the expenditure of such operations;

3. Authorizes the Secretary-General, pending a decision by the General Assembly at its resumed fifty-first session and in its efforts to achieve maximum savings, to commit expenditures in 1961 for United Nations operations in the Congo up to a total of $24 million for the period from 1 January to 31 March 1961.

text_fr: 960eme  seance  pleniere,
text_en: 960th plenary session,

text_fr: 20  decembre  1960.
text_en: 20 December 1960.

text_fr: 1591  (XV).  Ecole  internationale des  Nations  Unies
text_en: 1591 (XV). United Nations International School

text_fr: L' Assemblee  generale,
text_en: The General Assembly,

text_fr: Ayant exa,mine le  rapport  du  Secretaire  general  ac› compagne  du  rapport  du  Conseil  d'administration  de l'Ecole internationale  des  Nations  Unies 41 et  le  trente et  unieme  rapport du Comite  consultatif pour les  ques› tions  administratives et budgetaires a  l' Assemblee  gene› rale  ( quinzieme  session) 48 ,
text_en: Having examined the report of the Secretary-General ac› accompanying the report of the Board of Trustees of the United Nations International School 41 and the thirty-first report of the Advisory Committee on Administrative and Budgetary Questions to the General Assembly (thirteenth session) 48 ,

text_fr: N otant que l'Ecole, malgre  les  desavantages  materiels qu'elle continue de subir, semble avoir notablement rune› liore  son  enseignement  et  avoir  contribue a la  stabilite du  personnel  du  Siege  de  !'Organisation  des  Nations Unies,
text_en: In addition to the fact that the School, despite the material advantages it continues to suffer, seems to have substantially improved its teaching and has contributed to the stability of the staff of the United Nations Headquarters,

text_fr: Notant  en  outre que  le  but  vise,  qui  est  de  trouver des  locaux  permanents  pour !'Ecole, n'a pas  encore  ete atteint,
text_en: Noting further that the aim is to find permanent premises for!'School, has not yet been achieved,

text_fr: Rappelant sa  resolution  1439  (XIV)  du  5  decembre 1959,  par  laquelle  I'Assemblee  generale  a  decide  de fournir  au  Fonds de l'Ecole internationale,  pendant  une periode de  cinq ans,  !'assistance financiere  continue que I' Assemblee  pourrait  juger necessaire,
text_en: Recalling its Resolution 1439 (XIV) of 5 December 1959, by which the General Assembly decided to provide the Fund of the International School, for a period of five years, with continuing financial assistance which the Assembly may deem necessary,

items_fr: 1. Remercie le  Maire  et  la  Ville  de  New  York  du concours  qu'ils ont  apporte  en  mettant  a  la  disposition de  ]'Ecole internationale  des  Nations  Unies  les  locaux provisoires  qu'elle occupe  actuellement  et  de  leur  assis› tance  dans  la  recherche  d'un emplacement  permanent, d'un emit  raisonnable,  a  proximite  du  Siege  de  !'Or› ganisation des  Nations Unies;
items_en: 1. Expresses its appreciation to the Mayor and the City of New York for the assistance they have provided by making available to the United Nations International School the temporary premises it currently occupies and for their assistance in the search for a permanent location, a reasonable emit, a proximity of the Siege de !'Or› organization of the United Nations;

text_en: 46 Ibid., document A/C.5/856.

items_en: 47 Ibid., agenda item 61, document A/4541.
